title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
Oil +9.32% (24h) → $79.20: US struck Iran oil tanker near export terminal; Iran retaliated at US bases in Kuwait/Jordan. WTI up ~11% this week.
Fed's Jefferson (Jul 16): may need to hike if inflation stays sticky — FOMC Jul 28-29 now live.
Citadel Securities invests $400M in Crypto.com at $20B valuation.
Visa launches VSP stablecoin platform — USDC/USDG settlement for ~15,000 banks.
BTC -1.87%, ETH -2.82% (24h) — below alert thresholds.
